diff_summary: Added: ◆  ROLE SUMMARY; ──────────────────────────────────────────────; •  As a technical lead in automation engineering, you will dive deep into the design and development of automated solutions, leveraging advanced technologies such as machine learning, natural language processing, and robotic process automation to drive business efficiency. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify areas for automation and implement solutions that meet business requirements, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems. Your expertise in programming languages such as Python, R, and Java will be essential in developing and deploying automated solutions. You will stay up-to-date with emerging trends and technologies to continuously improve automation capabilities.... | Removed: ## Role Summary; As an Automation Engineer at Arvind Limited GCC, you will own the development and deployment of automated solutions to drive business efficiency and scalability. You will work closely with internal teams, including IT, operations, and business stakeholders, to identify areas for automation and implement solutions that meet business requirements. Your primary focus will be on leading a team of automation engineers to design, develop, and deploy automated solutions using technologies such as Python, R, and ML algorithms. You will drive business outcomes by improving process efficiency, reducing manual errors, and enhancing overall productivity.; ## Key Responsibilities...
